newsSince: No material company-specific news since June 9. Q1 2026 results (record licensing in 3 years, AI >20% of licensing, Bluetooth HDT RF win, Renesas R-Car V4H in 2026 Toyota RAV4) were reported May 11, well before the window. The +8% move since June 9 is flow/momentum, not new fundamentals.

sources.label: CEVA Bluetooth HDT RF design win (StockTitan)

verdicts.rankRationale: Through the co-packaged-optics lens CEVA has no direct CPO/optical relevance; it is a small wireless/edge-AI IP licensor. No news since June 9 changes that. Prior case flagged it for removal; nothing fundamental rehabilitates the CPO fit. Hold.
verdicts.bull: Record licensing quarter and edge-AI design wins (RAV4, NXP SDV) show IP traction.
verdicts.neutral: Real IP business but with no CPO/optical interconnect exposure relevant to this page.
verdicts.bear: Tiny $1.3B cap, +108% YTD, zero co-packaged-optics linkage; lumpy royalty model.
verdicts.primaryRisk: No CPO relevance; licensing revenue lumpiness
